name: Penne Rigate with Sweet Red Pepper Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 large sweet red pepper, chopped (~1-1/2 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Add the penne rigate and cook until al-dente. Drain and keep warm.
2. In olive oil, sauté carrots, onion, sweet red pepper, garlic, and basil until vegetables are soft.
3. Cut the silken tofu in half.
4. Blend one-third of the sautéed veggies with half the silken tofu in a blender until creamy. Repeat for the remaining mixture.
5. Return all ingredients to the pan. Heat through and season with salt and pepper.
6. Serve the sauce hot over warm pasta. Makes about 3-1/2 cups sauce, serving 6-8 people as a side dish or 4 people as the main course.
